taskSummary: Fix first-load journal entry rendering, D1-backed analysis timeline hydration and Home Office timeline rendering.
implementationSummary: Retired the old journal excerpts renderer that used obsolete custom markup on initial page load.
Kept journal entry rendering owned by journal-tabs.js so first-load and tab-switch use the same renderer.
Updated Analysis timeline to read D1 journal_entries before falling back to Airtable.
Added a reusable Home Office timeline macro and used it in the Analysis tab.
Updated the timeline UI to use Home Office timeline class structure.
